hero.description: Hızır Global Inc., with its integrated solutions in digital marketplace, logistics, technology, energy, and retail, is building one of Turkey's most comprehensive commerce ecosystems. We establish a fair, fast, and transparent system extending from the local producer to the end user.

why_us.description: Hızır Global offers a commerce infrastructure that unites independent brands under a single roof, is supported by technology, and based on sustainable growth. We don't just produce services — we create markets, build systems, and share profits.
why_us.card_1_desc: We manage all our brands under a single, integrated structure.
why_us.card_2_desc: We control processes end-to-end with our own software and operational systems.
why_us.card_3_desc: We offer a fair model that centers around tradesmen, producers, and entrepreneurs.
why_us.quote: Our goal is not just to build a marketplace, but to construct a fully integrated economic system extending from producer to consumer.

brands.description: Every brand within Hızır Global acts with a common infrastructure and vision. This structure ensures sustainable success across different sectors.

yetis_carsi.desc: A marketplace platform that integrates local tradesmen into the digital economy and strengthens local commerce.

yetis_yemek.desc: A new generation food ecosystem that brings together restaurants, couriers, and customers in a single system.

yetis_edepo.desc: End-to-end logistics, stock, and distribution infrastructure for producers and sellers.

hizir.desc: The ecosystem's power on the field: a fast, controlled, and integrated distribution network.

yte.desc: Technology-based transportation solutions for national and international commerce.

ecosystem.description: The Hızır Global ecosystem offers entrepreneurs not just a brand, but infrastructure, customers, technology, and operational support. You are not alone here. You are part of a system.

footer.description: We are building tomorrow's commerce infrastructure today. Hızır Global Inc. — New generation economy ecosystem.

ib_bor_page.title: İB BOR Partnership
ib_bor_page.subtitle: Our Domestic and National Power
ib_bor_page.desc: Hızır Global is the sole authorized sales and marketing distributor of Turkey's domestic and national fertilizer brand İB BOR across Turkey.

benefits.title: Why İB BOR?
items: High Efficiency: Improves soil structure and increases crop yield.
Natural Content: Environmentally friendly, supports sustainable agriculture.
Economic Solution: Offers cost-effective quality fertilizer for our farmers.
Strong Logistics: Fast delivery everywhere in Turkey with Hızır Global guarantee.
